backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the TRI-GITA SERVICES backend, handling lead submission/deletion/retrieval and user profile management with admin-only access control via included mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two features—AI hero illustration generation and Hero component background update—to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose, theme, and key fixes applied during development.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and mounting the app at the root div via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps all page sections (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, etc.) in a LanguageProvider context and renders the FloatingWhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy banner section displaying bank finance stats (loan approval rate, customer payment, tenure) with a shimmer animation and a WhatsApp CTA button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed-position floating WhatsApp button with a pulse ring animation, hover tooltip using the correct translation key, and a link to the business WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer with navy background displaying brand info, WhatsApp link, and contact details (phones, email, address, service area) using translation keys.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), and a WhatsApp CTA button, plus a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background illustration, headline, tagline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-stat cards.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form with validation for name, phone, email, city, and system size that submits via a mutation hook and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Intersection-observer-animated section displaying Odisha-specific solar subsidy tiers (1kW, 2kW, 3kW) with central, state, and total subsidy breakdowns in accent-colored cards.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Section explaining the government solar scheme with benefits, eligibility checklists, and a four-step process timeline using numbered cards and icons.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-column services section showcasing residential and commercial solar offerings, each with an image, feature list, and a CTA button that scrolls to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a three-card warranty section with navy/gold/teal accent styles, displaying years, title, and description for each warranty tier using i18n translations.
Displays a styled CTA section with a WhatsApp link, phone number, and decorative elements, directing users to contact via WhatsApp using a hardcoded number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Us' section with navy/gold/teal accents, icons, and translated titles/descriptions highlighting company advantages.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od'), persisting the selection to localStorage and restoring it on mount.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that submits lead form data to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the leads query cache on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines multilingual translation strings (English, Hindi, Odia) for all UI sections including header, hero, scheme info, services, and warranty content.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: Hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by combining useLanguage context with the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and declares keyframe animations (shimmer, pulse-ring, fade-in-up, accordion).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy/gold/teal color palettes using oklch, custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations matching those in index.css.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the TRI-GITA SERVICES solar energy app, recording completed features (AI illustration hero background), a pending action request to replace the hero background, and architectural notes.
